title: Bitcoin Historical Data
overview: Daily Bitcoin price (USD) and network metrics from the genesis block to 2024. Includes Volume, Market Cap, and Transaction counts.
usage_code:
import pandas as pd
url = 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/datasets/Bitcoin-Dataset/master/bitcoin_dataset.csv'
df = pd.read_csv(url)
print(df[['Date', 'btc_market_price']].tail())
